headline: Marathon Petroleum Corp (NYSE:MPC) Screen Highlight: High Growth Momentum Meets Strong Technical Breakout Setup
summary: Marathon Petroleum (MPC) combines strong HGM fundamentals with perfect technical ratings. High earnings growth, analyst upgrades, and a tight consolidation setup suggest a potential breakout entry.

headline: California eases carbon market rules amid affordability concerns
summary: Investing.com -- California regulators approved changes to the state’s carbon market that could provide up to $4 billion in additional free emissions allowances to oil refiners and other industrial companies, Bloomberg reported on Friday.
